channel.title: Memory-Semiconductors on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Memory-Semiconductors on Archive 03

item.title: SK Hynix Earnings: The Secret Behind the 72% Margin
item.description: SK Hynix recorded an operating profit margin of 72% in the first quarter of 2026, a figure rarely seen in the manufacturing industry. Mew, Kurumi, and Mikael dissect the high-profit structure created by HBM, server DRAM, and eSSD, along with the underlying risks of priced-in expectations, capacity expansion, and customer concentration.
